data.title: Global Reach
data.description: Netflix maintains a strong international presence, tailoring services for global audiences.
data.technical_spec: Availability in 190 countries, offering diverse language options and localized content.

data.title: Original Content Production
data.description: Investing heavily in creating original films and series to define brand uniqueness.
data.technical_spec: In-house production of content under Netflix Originals banner.

data.title: User-Centric Innovation
data.description: Continuous innovation focusing on enhancing user experience.
data.technical_spec: Investment in AI-driven personalization and seamless user interface developments.

data.title: Binge-Watching Format
data.description: Full-season releases cater to users who prefer binge-watching.
data.technical_spec: Releasing all episodes of a season simultaneously instead of weekly.

data.title: Data-Driven Decisions
data.description: Utilizing big data analytics to guide content strategy and customization.
data.technical_spec: Advanced data analytics and machine learning algorithms for user preference insights.
